eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 09:18 PM ON MAR 5, 2026 Effective until 03:18 AM MAR 6, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from Greenville, Texas. Suspect vehicle is a black 2017 Chevrolet Malibu with Texas license plate W H C 6 6 5 1. Missing child is Jolea Calabrese, 2 year old White female. Suspect is Raymond Calabrese 22 year old White male. Call Hunt County Sheriff's Office with information. If seen call 9 1 1.
